author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyDocs
description: Simple in-Discord documentation/wiki for servers without external hosting. Create, edit, and organize doc pages with categories. Features clean embed presentation, modal-based editing, autocomplete, search, and support for embed fields and images.
install_msg:
ShadyDocs installed!

User Commands:
- `/doc <name>` - View a doc page (with autocomplete)
- `/docs` - List all pages by category
- `/docsearch <query>` - Search pages

Admin Commands:
- `/docset add` - Create new page (opens modal)
- `/docset edit <name>` - Edit existing page
- `/docset delete <name>` - Delete page
- `/docset addcategory <name>` - Create category
- `/docset setcategory <page> <category>` - Organize page
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores documentation content, page metadata, and the user IDs of page authors/editors.
